comment.body:
Asked Grok how many days in 2024 were down more than 2.5%:

Thus, I conclude there was likely **1 day** in 2024 when the S&P 500 dropped more than 2.5%, with a possibility of up to 2–3 if additional unreported events occurred. For precision beyond this estimate, a full daily price history would be required, which I don’t have here.

**Final Answer**: Approximately 1 day, with a range of 1–3 possible based on incomplete data.
